start:prod.name: Start (PROD mode – dist viewer)
start:prod.command: cross-env BUILD_SOURCE='' BUILD=prod pnpm run start:dist

build:test.name: Build (TEST bundle)
build:test.command: cross-env BUILD_SOURCE='' BUILD=test pnpm run build:test

build:dev.name: Build (DEV bundle)
build:dev.command: cross-env BUILD_SOURCE='IIIF' BUILD=dev pnpm run build:dev

build:prod.name: Build (PROD bundle)
build:prod.command: cross-env BUILD_SOURCE='' BUILD=prod pnpm run build:dist
